case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. MAYRAS TRUCKING LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-02-2024 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 100200106) TO PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $968.41 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 210081059) AS TO DEFENDANT MAYRAS TRUCKING LLC
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 585 AND ASSIGNMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210081059) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAYRAS TRUCKING LLC $14,451.11 PRINCIPAL, $1,775.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $4,454.11 INTEREST, $968.41 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,648.63, SEE SCANNED DOC
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 100200106) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.

DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MAYRAS TRUCKING LLC
